title: oldenlandia boscii
intro: Oldenlandia boscii, also known as Bosc's oldenlandia or Bosc's fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia boscii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treating gastrointestinal problems like diarrhea and dysentery. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia boscii is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
